title: client[hallo_world]
description: This modpack is designed for players who love pure vanilla survival. We firmly believe that the best experience comes from the game itself.
body:
This modpack is designed for players who love **pure vanilla** survival. We firmly believe that the best experience comes from the game itself.

Without altering any vanilla gameplay or balance, we have carefully integrated a variety of client-side optimization mods aimed at addressing minor pain points in the original game, providing you with a smoother, more intuitive, and more enjoyable server gameplay experience.

From more quick click to clearer interface information, everything is designed to help you focus more on exploration, building, and collaboration.


<details>
<summary>Psst…… Click for a Secret</summary>

~~hello~~hallo world!

</details>
